title: Competencies of the UK nursing and midwifery workforce to mainstream genomics in the National Health Service: the ongoing gap between perceived importance and confidence in genomics.
author: Carpenter-Clawson C Watson M Pope A Lynch K Miles T Bell D Talbot M Varadi A
content: S-EPMC10312078 PMC10312078 Competencies of the UK nursing and midwifery workforce to mainstream genomics in the National Health Service: the ongoing gap between perceived importance and confidence in genomics.
